svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="总览" id="overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="-609" dy="-146" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="760" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="命令化骨架 + 局部自治 Loop" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="490" x="340" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="skel_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="命令化骨架(人按下回车 → 机器执行)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="490" x="60" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="skel_box" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="500" x="60" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="deploy" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=12;verticalAlign=middle;" value="部署流水线
/deploy-prod-be-ops

→ systemd 重启 → 健康验证

不改代码 · 不建迁移" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="220" x="200" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#0f766e;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="局部自治 Loop(机器定时跑,人介入边界)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="490" x="620" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop_box" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="490" x="620" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nightly" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=12;verticalAlign=middle;" value="夜间测试 Loop
00:00 自动触发

可逆 · 客观验证 · 不合并" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="220" x="640" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="review" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=12;verticalAlign=middle;" value="定时评审 Loop

主观 · 只告警不改" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="220" x="880" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backup" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=12;verticalAlign=middle;" value="每日备份 Loop

不可逆 · 人确认" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="220" x="760" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="judgement" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;" value="边界判据: 可逆性 × 客观验证 × 失败成本 —— 可逆 + 客观 + 低成本才自治; 不可逆 / 无验证 / 高成本留人手" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="930" x="120" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="feishu" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;dashed=1;" value="飞书告警贯穿所有 Loop: PASS / FAIL 都通知, 防「静默失败」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="430" x="370" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
